name: Blue Cash Preferred® Card from American Express

verdict.text: Easy keep if your grocery spend clears ~$1,600/yr

earn_note: The 6% supermarket rate caps at $6,000/yr (max $360/yr) — a household spending even half that already covers the $95 fee several times over. Streaming, gas, and transit round it out well beyond a single-category card.

points.note: Not a points program — cash back here is always worth exactly 1¢, redeemed as a statement credit. No transfer partners, no premium redemption to chase.

transfer_partners.highlight: Cash back isn't a transferable currency — it's a straight statement credit, always worth face value.

credits.name: Disney Bundle Credit
credits.subtitle: $10/mo · enroll
credits.description: Up to $10/month in statement credits toward Disney+, Hulu, or ESPN+ (including the Disney Bundle). Enrollment required.
tips: Only worth it if you already subscribe to a Disney streaming service — otherwise it's $0 to you.

insurance.detail: +1 year on warranties of 5 years or less · $10,000/item · $50,000/yr
Reimburses undamaged items merchants won't take back, within 90 days

protection_note: This is a cash-back card, not a travel card — no trip delay, trip cancellation, or rental car coverage. What it does have (extended warranty, return protection) is a step up from the fee-free Blue Cash Everyday.
rental_note: No rental car coverage at all — use a different card for rentals.

services.name: Foreign transaction fee applies
services.detail: 2.7% on purchases made outside the US — not built for international use.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns cash back on their spend (into your account)
Same purchase protection as the primary card

additional_cards.note: Additional cards are free — no reason not to add a trusted household member.

timeline.text: Disney Streaming credit raised from $84/yr to $120/yr ($10/mo), effective for eligible transactions from this date.
